products.name: Splatoon Raiders preorders for the Switch 2 are nearly 20 percent off

products.name: Google Search queries hit an ‘all time high’ last quarter

products.name: Ubuntu’s AI plans have Linux users looking for a ‘kill switch’

products.name: Motorola just revealed the Razr Fold’s price and hoo boy
products.summary: 2026 is shaping up to be a tough year to launch a high-end phone. The memory crisis has phone prices rising across the board, so an already expensive phone risks becoming a much too expensive phone. That might be what happened to the Razr Fold, which will cost

products.name: The new Razr Ultra is still the best-looking phone out there
products.summary: Look, you're not going to find much new on the 2026 version of the Motorola Razr Ultra. There's a new main camera sensor, a slightly bigger battery, and a higher price: $1,499, up from $1,299. But one thing hasn't changed: this is a darn good looking phone. Th

products.name: The Moto Razr and Razr Plus are victims of shrinkflation
products.summary: The memory crisis claims another couple of victims. Motorola's midtier and entry-level flip phones cost $100 more than their predecessors, and have few upgrades to show for it. The 2026 Razr Plus costs $1,099, up from $999. It still comes with a Snapdragon 8S

products.name: Google Photos launches an AI try-on feature for clothes you already have

products.name: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
products.summary: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.

products.name: Google Cloud surpasses $20B but says growth was capacity-constrained
products.summary: Google Cloud topped $20B in quarterly revenue for the first time, fueled by surging demand for AI. But capacity constraints mean it could have grown even faster.
